\tzpentry{ID3473}{Local Displacement Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3473 introduces Local Displacement Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ D_{\mathrm{local}} = \lim_{k\to\infty} \frac{\log(N_0 N_1\cdots N_{k-1})}{- \log (r^k)}. \]
